name: 20" Round Modern Knitted Pouf Ottoman Green - Jaipur Living: Cotton, Handmade, No Assembly Required
description: The charming Spectrum Pouf collection offers an array of colors to casual and contemporary spaces. This cotton pouf features a chunky knit weave for inviting style and handmade appeal. Perfect as a comfy ottoman or convenient as extra seating in a living space, this vibrant green floor cushion provides a versatile accent.
